name: speech-to-text
description: Transcribe audio to text with Whisper models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Fast Whisper Large V3, Whisper V3 Large. Capabilities: transcription, translation, multi-language, timestamps. Use for: meeting transcription, subtitles, podcast transcripts, voice notes. Triggers: speech to text, transcription, whisper, audio to text, transcribe audio, voice to text, stt, automatic transcription, subtitles generation, transcribe meeting, audio transcription, whisper ai
capabilities: Transcribe audio files using Fast Whisper Large V3 and Whisper V3 Large models
Support 99+ languages with automatic language detection
Generate timestamps for audio segments when needed
Translate foreign language audio to English transcripts
Extract audio from video files for transcription workflows
Create video subtitles and captions from transcripts
author: inference-sh-9
securitySummary: All 37 static analysis findings are false positives from markdown code examples in documentation. The skill contains only documentation (SKILL.md) with bash command examples demonstrating inference.sh CLI usage. No executable code, no prompt injection attempts, and no malicious intent detected. The allowed-tools directive properly restricts Bash tool to infsh commands only.
valueStatement: Convert audio recordings to accurate text transcripts using state-of-the-art Whisper models. Perfect for transcribing meetings, podcasts, voice notes, and generating video captions automatically.
limitations: Requires installation of inference.sh CLI tool before use
Depends on external inference.sh service API availability
Audio files must be accessible via public URL
Transcription speed and accuracy depend on audio quality
Cannot process real-time streaming audio (file-based only)

useCases.title: Meeting Transcription
useCases.description: Convert recorded meeting audio to searchable text for documentation and sharing

useCases.title: Podcast Production
useCases.description: Generate show notes and transcripts for podcast episodes to improve accessibility

useCases.title: Video Captioning
useCases.description: Create accurate subtitles for videos by transcribing audio tracks with timestamps

promptTemplates.title: Basic Transcription
promptTemplates.prompt: Transcribe the audio file at https://example.com/meeting.mp3 to text
promptTemplates.scenario: Quick transcription of any audio file URL

promptTemplates.title: Timestamps Included
promptTemplates.prompt: Transcribe https://example.com/podcast.mp3 and include timestamps for each segment
promptTemplates.scenario: When you need to know when specific words were spoken

promptTemplates.title: Translate to English
promptTemplates.prompt: Translate the Spanish audio at https://example.com/spanish.mp3 to English text
promptTemplates.scenario: Converting foreign language audio to English

promptTemplates.title: Video Subtitle Workflow
promptTemplates.prompt: Extract audio from https://example.com/video.mp4, transcribe it with timestamps, and prepare it for adding captions
promptTemplates.scenario: Complete workflow for creating video subtitles

bestPractices: Use high-quality audio recordings for best transcription accuracy
Include timestamps when creating subtitles or need to reference specific moments
Choose Fast Whisper model for speed, Whisper V3 Large for highest accuracy
Provide audio files in common formats like MP3, WAV, or M4A for best compatibility
antiPatterns: Do not attempt to transcribe real-time audio streams - this tool requires file URLs
Avoid using very low-quality or noisy recordings without considering post-processing
Do not forget to install the inference.sh CLI before attempting transcription
Avoid requesting transcription of copyrighted content without proper permissions

faq.question: What audio formats are supported?
faq.answer: The tool accepts audio files accessible via public URL in common formats including MP3, WAV, M4A, and others supported by the Whisper models.

faq.question: How accurate is the transcription?
faq.answer: Whisper V3 Large provides state-of-the-art accuracy. Fast Whisper Large V3 offers similar accuracy with faster processing. Both support 99+ languages.

faq.question: Do I need to install anything?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to install the inference.sh CLI tool using the command: curl -fsSL https://cli.inference.sh | sh && infsh login

faq.question: Can I transcribe real-time audio?
faq.answer: No, this tool works with pre-recorded audio files. Real-time transcription requires a different solution designed for streaming audio.

faq.question: What is the difference between the two models?
faq.answer: Fast Whisper Large V3 prioritizes speed while maintaining accuracy. Whisper V3 Large provides the highest possible accuracy but may take longer to process.

faq.question: Can I translate foreign audio to English?
faq.answer: Yes, use the translate task parameter to transcribe and translate foreign language audio directly to English text in one step.
